column1: # Evolving draft of descriptive categories and more detailed notes

column5: Top-ranked model from retrospective for each age class. Retrospective ranking time window varied by age class, depending on observed pattern.
column6: Age-specific model ranking in ForecastR App comparing various naive models; time series models; and sibling regressions.  Age 3 used time series with exponential smoothing and Box-Cox transformation.  Age 4 used simple sib reg. Age 5 used sib reg with time-varying slope parameter (Kalman Filter). Age 6 used simple sib reg.
